```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1em;">the principle</div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.6em;flex-wrap:wrap;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border:1px solid #FAD9D2;">
   <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:0.5em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.3em;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="bot" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">AI assists</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">drafts code, mechanics</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1.2em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.3);border:2px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.6em;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.18);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.35em;color:#F8F7F0;"><i data-lucide="shield-check" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">YOU</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:rgba(248,247,240,0.85);line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.25em;">decide · sign off</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border:1px solid #C8E6C9;">
   <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:0.5em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.3em;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="circle-check-big" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Defensible</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">claim about the world</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  Decide which steps a human <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">must</span> own. Then enforce that boundary.
 </div>

</div>
```
